rules.success_condition: Set the pins in the correct binding order before the timer expires.
rules.failure_condition: Run out of time or break the pick.

authored_content.title: Evidence Locker #402
authored_content.intro: A locked evidence cabinet is holding the ledger page that can move the investigation forward.
instructions: Tap a pin or use the arrows to select it.
Hold the lift control until the split lands on the green line, then release.
Set the pins in the right order to open the locker.
If you force a pin through the red zone, the pick snaps and the room gets the reduced fallback clue.
authored_content.success_message: Evidence secured. The locker opens before the room can clean up its story.
authored_content.success_clue: Recovered clue: the ledger was opened before the body was announced, and the name in the margin matches someone who should not have had the key.
authored_content.fallback_message: The lock holds. The host can still deliver the reduced clue.
authored_content.fallback_clue: Reduced clue: someone in the room had access to the locker before the announcement, but not the whole story.

behavioral_outputs.description: Elapsed time before the locker opens or the fallback triggers.
Count of times the pick snapped during the attempt.
